issue_title: Logging out with Command leads to open sidebar
issue_body_preview:
When you are logging out via the command interface you will get directed to the marketingPage. Problem is: The sidebar doesn't disappear.
This only happens when you are not on the main dashboard page but eg on the billing page.

I tried some different thing and noticed that when you go to Billings a
test_description_zh: 在非主仪表盘页面（如账单页面）通过命令面板（Command）执行登出操作，观察页面跳转后侧边栏的显示状态。
expected_result_zh: 通过命令面板登出后，页面应跳转到营销首页，侧边栏应自动关闭/隐藏，不应残留在页面上。
